parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor in physical environments (kitchen, living room). App interfaces and animated characters are added as digital overlays in post-production.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light brown complexion. He has short, curly dark hair and a light beard/stubble. He wears round, wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Olive green short-sleeved t-shirt and light blue jeans.

scenes.setting: Modern kitchen, daytime, white cabinets, white countertop.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands behind a white kitchen counter. He is pouring milk from a blue and white carton into a white bowl. He looks directly forward with a conversational expression. A smartphone lies flat on the counter to his right. The background features white kitchen cabinets and a stainless steel oven.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter is in a kitchen pouring milk into a bowl while looking at the camera. Text captions appear on screen as he speaks.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Wanna know something wild?
Character A says: Duolingo teaches chess.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Wanna know something wild?
Duolingo teaches chess.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up view of a hand holding a smartphone. The screen displays a digital chessboard with dark squares and stylized, cartoonish chess pieces. A thumb interacts with the screen, moving a piece.

scenes.visual_description: A screencast of the Duolingo app showing a chess puzzle. A hand interacts with the screen. An animated character appears at the top of the app interface. Text captions are overlaid.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: It's all puzzle-based, bite-sized strategy that sticks.
Character A says: It's built for beginners and those who pretend to be pros.
Character A says: Coach Oscar helps everyone the same.
scenes.on_screen_text:
puzzle-based strategy sticks.
beginners pretend to be pros.
Coach Oscar helps everyone

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A leans forward on the white kitchen counter. He holds a pair of metal kitchen tongs vertically near his mouth, gripping them as if they were a microphone. He has a slightly amused, exasperated expression. A single white chess piece sits on the counter in front of him.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter leans on the kitchen counter, holding tongs like a mic. An animated character, Coach Oscar, is overlaid on the left side of the screen, speaking. The presenter then responds. Text captions are visible.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: Is this your strategy or a cry for help?
Character A says: He loves to humble me as he teaches.
Character A says: But yeah, it's 100% free.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Is this your strategy or a cry for help?
humble me teaches.
100% free.

scenes.setting: Living room, daytime, beige couch, bookshelf.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits comfortably on a beige sofa in a brightly lit living room. He holds a smartphone in his left hand and points towards the camera with his right index finger. He is smiling. A tall wooden bookshelf filled with books is visible in the background.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter sits on a couch, holding his phone and pointing at the camera, delivering the final call to action. Text captions are overlaid.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Your move.
Character A says: Learn chess at Duolingo today for free.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Your move.
Learn chess at Duolingo today for free.
